positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a majestic mountain landscape at sunrise. The composition features clean, crisp silhouettes of pine trees and jagged peaks against a gradient sky of soft pastels (peach, lavender, sky blue) merging into deep indigos at the zenith. Focus on strong negative space and geometric shapes. The style should be inspired by Nordic folk art and abstract woodcuts, using solid, flat colors with minimal shading. Central, balanced, and highly graphic. Ideal for screen printing on apparel. Vibrant, high-contrast, clean lines.
negative: photorealistic, photo, noise, blur, text, words, signature, watermark, ugly, distorted, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, artifacts
